title: ElectrochemicalMethodology
description: Schema for extracting electrochemical measurement methodology from scientific articles on hard carbon anodes in sodium-ion batteries.

cell_type.description: The type of electrochemical cell used, e.g. 'coin cell', 'Swagelok cell', 'pouch cell', 'cylindrical cell'. Include the format code if mentioned, e.g. 'CR2032'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet from the article that supports the extracted cell type.

cell_configuration.description: The electrode configuration of the cell, e.g. 'half-cell', 'full cell', 'symmetric cell'.

evidence.description: Exact text snippet supporting the extracted configuration.

cell_assembly_details.description: Description of cell assembly conditions including counter electrode, separator, and atmosphere. Example: 'CR2032 coin cells assembled in an argon-filled glovebox using sodium metal counter electrode and glass fiber separator.'

evidence.description: Sentence or text span describing the cell assembly.

active_material.description: The active material used in the working electrode. Usually the hard carbon sample name reported in the article.

evidence.description: Text snippet identifying the active material or sample name.

electrode_composition.description: Composition of the electrode slurry including active material, conductive additive, and binder fractions. Example: '80 wt% hard carbon, 10 wt% Super P, 10 wt% PVDF'.

binder.description: Binder material used in the electrode slurry, e.g. 'PVDF', 'CMC', 'SBR', 'PAA'. Include full name if given.

current_collector.description: Material used as the current collector for the working electrode, e.g. 'copper foil', 'Cu foil', 'carbon-coated aluminium foil'.

mass_loading.description: Areal mass loading of active material on the electrode, typically reported in units such as 'mg cm⁻²'. If a range is given include the range as a string.

evidence.description: Text snippet describing the electrode mass loading.

electrode_preparation.description: Description of electrode slurry preparation, coating, and drying conditions. Example: 'Slurry cast on Cu foil using NMP and dried at 80 °C under vacuum overnight.'

evidence.description: Sentence describing electrode preparation and drying.

electrolyte.description: Full electrolyte composition including salt, concentration, solvent mixture, and additives. Example: '1 M NaPF6 in EC:DEC (1:1) with 5 vol% FEC'.

evidence.description: Text snippet describing the electrolyte composition.

separator.description: Separator material used in the cell, e.g. 'glass fiber', 'Celgard 2400', 'polypropylene membrane'.

voltage_window.description: Voltage range used for galvanostatic charge-discharge cycling, including reference electrode if specified. Example: '0.01–2.5 V vs Na/Na+'.

current_densities.description: List of current densities used during electrochemical testing, e.g. rate capability tests.

value.description: Current density value with units, e.g. '50 mA g⁻¹'.

cycling_instrument.description: Battery cycler or instrument used for galvanostatic testing, e.g. 'LAND CT2001A', 'Neware BTS4000', 'Arbin'.

evidence.description: Text snippet mentioning the testing instrument.

notes.description: Any additional details about electrochemical methodology not captured in the structured fields above.
